prompt: Create a dark cinematic anime illustration of a melancholic gothic lolita girl crouching in a narrow rainy city alley at night. The girl is close to the camera on the right side of the frame, with a large head-and-knees composition, pale skin, a shy distant expression, glowing pale lavender-gray eyes, wet eyelashes, and rain droplets running down her face, shoulders, arms, and bare knees. She has dramatic split-color hair: the left side is silver white and the right side is jet black, styled into long twin tails with black ribbon bows and messy wet bangs covering part of her face. Her outfit is a black gothic frill dress with ruffled straps, lace trim, a high neck detail, and small bow accents, slightly glossy from rain. Her right hand is held near her lips in a hesitant pose, while she crouches compactly with one knee prominently in the foreground. The background is a dense cyberpunk Japanese-style alley with tall dark buildings, wet pavement, puddles, pipes, shop doors, and neon signage reflected in the ground; include visible glowing signs such as 酒店 and a small BAR sign on the left. Use a moody blue-purple-black palette with hot pink and cyan neon highlights, heavy rain, reflective puddles, high contrast rim lighting, soft bloom, intricate painterly anime rendering, detailed hair strands, delicate linework, cinematic depth, and a lonely late-night atmosphere. Square 1:1 canvas, no border, no watermark, no extra characters.
